final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    input [3:0] input_val,
    output reg [3:0] output_val
);localparam CONSTANT_VAL = 4'b1011;

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk, posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt)
    if (rst) begin
        output_val <= 4'b0;
    end else if (en) begin
        output_val <= input_val + CONSTANT_VAL;
    end

endmodule
